## 来源说明

以下证据来自海外科技播客 RSS/curated 条目与 Apple Podcasts Top Shows 榜单。只允许依据标题、节目、发布日期、链接和节目简介/内容写作；不得编造嘉宾、transcript、观点或未提供的事实。

## 本期元数据

### 1. Building Reliable AI Developer Platforms

- 节目：Latent Space
- 来源：Latent Space
- 发布日期：2099-01-02
- 链接：https://example.com/podcast/dev-platforms
- 音频：https://example.com/podcast/dev-platforms.mp3
- 简介：An interview with a platform engineering lead about AI coding agents, eval suites, release safety, code review bottlenecks, and how developer infrastructure teams redesign workflows when machine-generated pull requests become common.

### 2. The Co-Founders of Claude AI on Everyday Impact

- Apple Top Shows 排名：#3
- 节目：The Oprah Podcast
- 来源：Apple Podcasts Top Shows
- 发布日期：2099-01-02
- 链接：https://example.com/podcast/oprah-claude
- 音频：https://example.com/podcast/oprah-claude.mp3
- 简介：A conversation about how AI assistants change everyday work, learning, and decision-making, with examples of how people use chat assistants responsibly and the limits they should keep in mind.

## 写作边界

- 这是播客笔记，不是新闻快讯。需要写成长文中文笔记，直接按每期节目独立小节展开，不要额外生成总览或播客清单。
- 若简介没有明确嘉宾姓名，嘉宾字段写“未标明”，不要猜。
- 不要生成投资建议、产品购买建议或夸张标题。
